name: GRID: Grammar-Railed Decoding for Enterprise SQL Generation

description: arXiv:2607.11951v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models can write SQL, but enterprise deployment demands more than plausible text: outputs must be syntactically valid, must respect per-role and per-schema policy, must carry provable (not best-effort) guarantees, must not slow down as generations grow, and must leave a compliance-grade record of every decision. author: Mohsen Arjmandi
